notes: F004 was baked into F001/F002/F003 as they landed -- see each feature's mock file for the 375 px pass. This handoff closes out the horizontal concern: the canonical Sprint 0 breakpoint is @media (max-width: 700px); every P0 route now consumes it. Frontend to (1) hoist .nav flex-wrap into _BASE_CSS so nav pills reflow instead of horizontal-scrolling, (2) add a base-level @media (max-width: 700px) block that pins position:fixed elements inline and tightens body padding, (3) ship a static smoke test that guards these invariants forever.
review_criteria: Every static page constant contains at least one @media (max-width: Npx) block
.nav is flex-wrap:wrap so seven pills reflow on 375 px
No page has body-level overflow-x: scroll
No font-size < 10 px on any user-visible surface
